componentRoots.description: Shared UI components used across the dashboard and settings surfaces

excludedStates.reason: Settings is a configuration form, not a data collection surface.

routes.description: Settings view: reached via activeSidebarItem='settings' sidebar navigation

excludedStates.reason: Catalog panel is a statically-rendered section within the Settings view.
Catalog always shows installed skills/agents — empty is not a reachable state.
Catalog fetch errors surface as inline status text, not a distinct error surface.
Catalog has no disabled mode.
Focus state is a CSS concern covered by component-level testing.

routes.description: Catalog (Assets & Tools) view: reached via Settings → Assets & Tools section

excludedStates.reason: Loading behavior is covered by the repository component test and the evidence adapter captures settled inventory.
The runtime evidence uses discovered repositories; the empty and no-results states are component-tested.
Repository API failures are covered by store and component tests and are not injected by the browser adapter.
Only mutation controls disable during requests; their behavior is component-tested.
Keyboard focus behavior is covered by component tests and shared focus-visible styling.

routes.description: Canonical repository browser with grouped inventory and secondary registration/discovery dialogs.

excludedStates.reason: Workspace view is opened from a seeded real repository; loading happens in repo registration flow.
Empty is covered by the repositories view when no repos are registered.
Workspace errors surface through the repositories error handling.
Workspace has no disabled mode.
Focus state is a CSS concern covered by component-level testing.

routes.description: Workspace view: reached by seeding and opening a real repository workspace in the browser evidence runner.

excludedStates.reason: Git loading is covered by component tests; browser evidence targets the populated repo workspace.
Git tab requires an opened repository; empty repository routing is covered by repositories view.
Git API failures surface inline in component tests and are not yet scriptable in the browser evidence runner.
Disabled Git actions are covered by render tests for commit and push gating.
Focus state is covered by shared button/input CSS and component-level checks.

routes.description: Real opened-repository Workspace Git tab with operation banner, branch state, worktrees, checks summary, and commit/push controls.

excludedStates.reason: Checks loading is covered by component tests; the browser runner captures the real opened-repository tab surface.
No-lane checks state is covered by component tests and requires repo fixture control not available in the browser runner.
Check API failure states are currently unit-tested and not yet scriptable in the browser evidence runner.
Disabled run controls are covered by render tests during an active check run.
Focus state is covered by shared button/input CSS and component-level checks.

routes.description: Real opened-repository Workspace Checks tab with operation banner, profile controls, lane matrix, logs, and run history.

excludedStates.reason: Assets loading is component-tested; browser evidence targets the populated workspace assets surface.
The opened repository always exposes the assets navigation surface.
Asset API failures are covered by render tests and inline messages.
Disabled asset controls are covered by component tests.
Focus state is covered by shared button/input CSS and component-level checks.

routes.description: Real opened-repository Workspace Assets tab with repository asset tree and viewer.
